text:
(a) The department shall designate as temporary visitor stations certain driver’s license offices.

(b) A driver’s license office designated as a temporary visitor station under this section must have at least two staff members who have completed specialized training on the temporary visitor issuance guide published by the department.

(c) A driver’s license office designated as a temporary visitor station shall provide information and assistance to other driver’s license offices in the state.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.007 — Temporary Visitor Stations

(a) The department shall designate as temporary visitor stations certain driver’s license offices.

(b) A driver’s license office designated as a temporary visitor station under this section must have at least two staff members who have completed specialized training on the temporary visitor issuance guide published by the department.

(c) A driver’s license office designated as a temporary visitor station shall provide information and assistance to other driver’s license offices in the state.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., 1st C.S., Ch. 4 (S.B.1), Sec. 72.01, eff. September 28, 2011.*

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A driver’s license office designated as a temporary visitor station shall provide information and assistance to other driver’s license offices in the state.
